parameters.query:
SELECT
  c.id,
  c.customer_phone,
  c.customer_name,
  c.status,
  c.last_customer_message_at,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - c.last_customer_message_at)) / 60 AS minutes_waiting,
  CASE
    WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - c.last_customer_message_at)) / 60 >= {{ $env.ALERT_URGENT_MINUTES || 15 }} THEN 'urgent'
    WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - c.last_customer_message_at)) / 60 >= {{ $env.ALERT_WARN_MINUTES || 5 }} THEN 'warning'
    ELSE 'ok'
  END AS alert_level
FROM conversations c
WHERE c.status IN ('in_queue', 'in_progress')
  AND c.last_customer_message_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.last_customer_message_at ASC

INSERT INTO conversation_alerts (conversation_id, alert_level, minutes_waiting, created_at)
VALUES ({{ $json.id }}, '{{ $json.alert_level }}', {{ $json.minutes_waiting }}, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (conversation_id, alert_level)
DO UPDATE SET minutes_waiting = EXCLUDED.minutes_waiting, updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id
